description: POSITIVE fixture register — every contributor resolves, one canonical source per concept, no shared contributor, no operator-trace Resource, every kind matches its source's primitive class, every declared projection resolves to a fixture mount tag, the stateful concept declares a livenessOwner, and every catalog stream (core.action-ledger / core.operation-history / core.health-events / core.head-log) is a declared contributor (stream-uncovered passes — full reverse-coverage, 575 §13 L1).
